emails.body: New Enrononline Counterparties: Servicios Indusriales Penoles/Terrapin Recycling LLC I have retrieved Carol's EOL Mexico file but Mark tells me that he did some follow up work with Mexican counsel and that you may have the results of that. Do you have anything? Thanks, Brent Forwarded by Brent Hendry/NA/Enron on 10/31/2000 11:03 AM Phillippa Daniel 10/31/2000 10:32 AM
